test_sufficiency_summary: Targeted tactical coverage exists and TacticalTests still pass, but repeated GUI reruns still intermittently fail on TacticalGuiLiveTest centering, so stable repeated validation was not achieved.
documentation_accuracy_summary: DesignNotes.md matches the intended parent-relative fallback semantics, but documenter_report.md overstates the remediation as having deflaked wxGTK runs.
commands_verified: cd tests/gui && make && for i in 1 2 3; do GDK_BACKEND=x11 ./GuiTests | tail -n 30; done
